purpose: Workers script secrets CRUD + user API token list/revoke

minimum_scope.description: Use a custom Cloudflare API token (NOT the global API key). Restrict 'Account Resources' to the SPECIFIC account ID and add only the permissions below.
minimum_scope.ip_filter: Optional but recommended: restrict to known CI runner IPs
minimum_scope.ttl: Set TTL to 1-90 days based on usage
